message:
feat(layout,text): fix cluster byte-range mapping, add shaped render and shaping fallback modules

Layout crate (ftui-layout):
- pane.rs: fix dock preview test to use vertically-centered pointer
  position, adjust group selection test expectations, extensive
  rustfmt reformatting for line-length compliance
- cache.rs: replace closure with function pointer in test calls
- lib.rs: alphabetize public re-exports
- Add pane_invariant_fuzz.rs for property-based pane split/merge testing

Text crate (ftui-text):
- cluster_map.rs: FIX cell_range_to_byte_range to correctly resolve
  the byte span for wide characters — previously used cell_to_byte()
  which could under-report the byte range when a wide char is only
  partially covered by the cell range; now finds the cluster containing
  (cell_end - 1) and uses its byte_end. Updated doc examples and tests.
- Add shaped_render module: CellPlacement, RenderHint, ShapedLineLayout,
  SpacingDelta types for post-shaping cell placement pipeline
- Add shaping_fallback module: FallbackEvent, FallbackStats,
  ShapingFallback for graceful degradation when primary shaper fails
- lib.rs: wire new modules and re-exports
- script_segmentation.rs, shaping.rs: rustfmt reformatting only

E2E:
- e2e_jsonl_schema.json: add pane_trace and pane_artifact_bundle
  event schemas for structured E2E traceability

Also syncs beads issue tracker metadata.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
